containerDefinitions.name: restore
command: set -e; set -x; echo 'Installing tools...'; dnf -y install postgresql15 awscli; echo 'AWS identity:'; aws sts get-caller-identity; echo 'Downloading SQL from S3...'; aws s3 ls s3://honeylove-backend-672911155558-us-east-1-assets/db_backup/; aws s3 cp s3://honeylove-backend-672911155558-us-east-1-assets/db_backup/honeylove2026-02-10.sql /tmp/restore.sql; ls -lh /tmp/restore.sql; head -n 5 /tmp/restore.sql || true; echo 'Ensuring DB honeylove exists...'; export PGPASSWORD="$PGPASSWORD"; psql "host=$RDS_HOST port=5432 dbname=postgres user=$DB_USER sslmode=require" -c "SELECT version();"; psql "host=$RDS_HOST port=5432 dbname=postgres user=$DB_USER sslmode=require" -tc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname=''honeylove''" | grep -q 1 || psql "host=$RDS_HOST port=5432 dbname=postgres user=$DB_USER sslmode=require" -c "CREATE DATABASE \"honeylove\";"; echo 'Restoring...'; psql "host=$RDS_HOST port=5432 dbname=honeylove user=$DB_USER sslmode=require" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f /tmp/restore.sql; echo 'Done.'
